## Checklist

- [ ] Issue linked above, or exception explained
- [ ] Tests / verification described
- [ ] Screenshots/video for visual changes, or marked N/A
- [ ] Reviewed the diff myself and can explain the changes
- [ ] No new strings/URLs pointing at `kilo.ai` / `kiloapps.io` / `kilocode.*`
